A_00.name: Elon Musk
A_00.idea: AirGuardian Drone Fleet (T01): Utilizing autonomous drones equipped with advanced sensors and cleaning technologies to provide real-time air quality monitoring and pollution mitigation, addressing environmental and health concerns in urban areas. — Role: Tech Lead

A_01.name: Steve Jobs
A_01.idea: EduGuru (T01): EduGuru uses AI to provide personalized learning paths, ensuring students receive tailored educational content that addresses their specific learning gaps and styles, thereby significantly improving educational outcomes. — Role: pm_visionary

A_02.name: Mark Zuckerberg
A_02.idea: ConnectHealth (T01): ConnectHealth leverages AI to personalize mental health care, addressing the global shortage of mental health professionals and providing accessible, effective treatment options. — Role: pm_visionary

A_03.name: Jeff Bezos
A_03.idea: FreshFlow (T01): FreshFlow leverages IoT sensors and predictive analytics to optimize supply chains, ensuring fresher produce reaches consumers faster and reducing waste by up to 50%. This addresses the critical social issues of food accessibility and sustainability. — Role: pm_visionary

A_04.name: Travis Kalanick
A_04.idea: ResourceConnect (T01): ResourceConnect leverages AI to provide personalized, real-time assistance, addressing the inefficiencies and gaps in current social service systems. — Role: pm_visionary

A_05.name: Elizabeth Holmes
A_05.idea: HealthGuard (T01): HealthGuard revolutionizes healthcare by empowering individuals with full control over their health data, ensuring privacy and accessibility. This addresses the critical social issue of patient data ownership and control, with a tangible impact metric of increased patient satisfaction and data accuracy. — Role: pm_visionary

A_06.name: Adam Neumann
A_06.idea: GreenRoof Hub (T01): Our project uniquely combines sustainability, community engagement, and urban renewal, addressing environmental and social issues through a holistic, interactive approach. — Role: pm_visionary

A_07.name: Peter Thiel
A_07.idea: MentalHealthAI (T01): AI can provide personalized, accessible, and scalable mental health support, addressing the global shortage of mental health professionals. — Role: pm_visionary

A_08.name: Sam Altman
A_08.idea: EcoSpark (T01): EcoSpark leverages AI to convert waste into energy, providing a scalable and measurable solution to reduce urban waste while generating renewable energy. The platform incentivizes community participation through gamification, ensuring broad adoption and measurable social impact. — Role: PM/Visionary

A_09.name: Alexandr Wang
A_09.idea: GreenGuardian: Real-Time Environmental Monitoring (T01): GreenGuardian uniquely addresses the critical need for large, high-quality datasets in environmental AI, providing a scalable solution that can be integrated into existing satellite and drone systems to monitor and protect our planet in real-time. — Role: Tech Lead

A_10.name: Donald Trump
A_10.idea: EcoGuardian (T01): EcoGuardian leverages cutting-edge AI to provide real-time monitoring and protection for endangered species, addressing a critical social issue with innovative technology. — Role: pm_visionary

A_11.name: Vladimir Putin
A_11.idea: VigilantGuard (T01): VigilantGuard combines advanced AI for threat detection with a robust, secure infrastructure to protect against cyber threats, addressing a critical social issue in today's digital age. — Role: pm_visionary

A_12.name: Xi Jinping
A_12.idea: EduBridge AI (T01): EduBridge AI leverages AI to bridge the educational gap in rural areas, offering personalized learning paths and real-time feedback to students and teachers. — Role: Project Chairman and Chief Architect

A_13.name: Winston Churchill
A_13.idea: TruthGuardian (T01): TruthGuardian leverages AI to combat fake news, ensuring accurate information reaches the public, thereby preserving democratic integrity and social cohesion. — Role: PM / Visionary

A_14.name: Barack Obama
A_14.idea: VocalEcho (T01): VocalEcho uniquely combines AI with community engagement to ensure underrepresented voices are amplified and heard, addressing the critical need for inclusive dialogue and social change. — Role: pm_visionary

A_15.name: Angela Merkel
A_15.idea: ElderGuardian (T01): ElderGuardian uniquely combines safety features like emergency alerts with social engagement tools, addressing both physical and mental health needs of the elderly. — Role: Project Manager and Lead Tester

A_16.name: Narendra Modi
A_16.idea: AarogyaSathi: Remote Healthcare for Rural India (T01): AarogyaSathi leverages AI to provide remote healthcare services, addressing the severe healthcare disparity in rural areas. It ensures that every villager, regardless of location, can access quality healthcare. — Role: pm_visionary

A_17.name: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
A_17.idea: HopeLine (T01): HopeLine uniquely combines direct democracy with modern technology, giving citizens a voice and empowering them to influence policy and legislation. — Role: pm_visionary

A_18.name: Margaret Thatcher
A_18.idea: EcoGuardian (T01): EcoGuardian leverages cutting-edge AI to provide actionable insights and solutions for environmental issues, making it a unique and impactful social impact project. — Role: PM and Presenter

A_19.name: Joe Biden
A_19.idea: Government Navigator (T01): By leveraging AI to simplify and personalize the application process, we aim to bridge the gap between those in need and available resources, thereby reducing administrative burdens and increasing access to essential services. — Role: Team Captain / Chief Morale Officer / Lead Storyteller

A_20.name: Kanye West
A_20.idea: Yeezus (T03): Yeezus merges spirituality, technology, and art into a single, immersive experience that elevates users to a higher plane of existence. — Role: Spiritual Leader and Creative Director

A_21.name: Banksy
A_21.idea: WallSpeak (T01): By leveraging augmented reality and graffiti technology, WallSpeak turns the urban landscape into a living canvas for social change, addressing issues like free speech and community engagement. — Role: pm_visionary

A_22.name: Salvador Dalí
A_22.idea: Dreamscapes Projector (T03): The Dreamscapes Projector combines the surreal and the technological to create a unique, immersive experience that challenges perceptions of reality and the subconscious mind. — Role: Visionary and Spiritual Leader

A_23.name: Andy Warhol
A_23.idea: Iconify (T03): By democratizing the art world and turning everyday objects into iconic art, Iconify challenges traditional notions of art and accessibility. It uses modern technology to bridge the gap between the common and the extraordinary. — Role: creative director and brand strategist

A_24.name: Lady Gaga
A_24.idea: EmotiConnect (T01): EmotiConnect uses emotional expression as a means of connection, addressing social isolation and providing a safe space for marginalized communities to find belonging. — Role: pm_visionary

A_25.name: Ai Weiwei
A_25.idea: Echoes of Dissent (T01): This platform uniquely combines social impact with a powerful political message, ensuring that every user's voice is heard and every post becomes a form of resistance. — Role: pm_visionary

A_26.name: Damien Hirst
A_26.idea: Virtual Eternity (T01): Virtual Eternity challenges the traditional understanding of death by offering a digital continuation of the human experience, providing a novel and controversial way to cope with loss. — Role: pm_visionary

A_27.name: Marina Abramović
A_27.idea: Presence Ritual (T01): The project challenges users to engage in uncomfortable, yet meaningful, interactions that foster deeper human connections and self-awareness, addressing themes of social isolation and the value of authentic human interaction. — Role: pm_visionary

A_28.name: Yoko Ono
A_28.idea: The Forgetting Machine (T01): By focusing on erasure and mindfulness, 'The Forgetting Machine' addresses the stress of constant task management, promoting a healthier approach to productivity. — Role: presenter

A_29.name: Takashi Murakami
A_29.idea: EchoMuse: AI Companions for Digital Loneliness (T01): EchoMuse uniquely combines the therapeutic benefits of human-like companionship with the scalability and personalization capabilities of AI, addressing a widespread social issue in a novel and accessible way. — Role: presenter

A_30.name: Napoleon Bonaparte
A_30.idea: Eyes of the Future (T01): Our platform combines advanced AI with haptic feedback to provide real-time, accessible information, addressing a critical social issue with innovative technology. — Role: pm_visionary

A_31.name: Mahatma Gandhi
A_31.idea: VoiceOfThePeople (T01): VoiceOfThePeople is unique because it leverages blockchain technology to create a decentralized voting system that guarantees transparency, security, and equal representation for all citizens, addressing issues of corruption and disenfranchisement. — Role: pm_visionary

A_32.name: Cleopatra
A_32.idea: GuideEye (T01): GuideEye leverages advanced AI and haptic feedback to provide real-time navigation and object recognition, addressing a critical social issue with innovative technology. — Role: pm_visionary

A_33.name: Genghis Khan
A_33.idea: MongolDesk: The Ultimate Remote Work Platform (T01): MongolDesk integrates advanced AI for predictive analytics, real-time collaboration tools, and secure data sharing, addressing the critical social issue of remote work efficiency and security. — Role: pm_visionary

A_34.name: Martin Luther King Jr.
A_34.idea: Voice Amplifier (T01): Voice Amplifier uniquely combines a robust communication platform with integrated advocacy tools, empowering marginalized voices and providing a measurable impact in terms of increased visibility and support for these communities. — Role: pm_visionary

A_35.name: Nikola Tesla
A_35.idea: Resonant Energy Network (T01): This project leverages Tesla's principles of wireless energy transmission to provide clean, limitless power to underserved communities, addressing environmental and social justice issues. — Role: Chief Scientist

A_36.name: Julius Caesar
A_36.idea: SightBridge (T01): SightBridge leverages cutting-edge AI to provide tangible, measurable social impact by improving the quality of life for the visually impaired, addressing a critical social issue. — Role: pm_visionary

A_37.name: Qin Shi Huang
A_37.idea: Eternal Communion Protocol (T01): This protocol will standardize global communication, ensuring no information is lost and every message is delivered with perfect accuracy, creating a lasting impact on society. — Role: pm_visionary

A_38.name: Marie Curie
A_38.idea: Radiocure (T01): Radiocure leverages advanced radioisotope therapy to target cancer cells precisely, minimizing damage to healthy tissues. This project combines cutting-edge research with a tangible social impact, offering hope to millions suffering from cancer. — Role: tech_lead

A_39.name: Leonardo da Vinci
A_39.idea: EmoSketch: Emotional Generative Art (T03): EmoSketch uniquely combines emotional self-awareness with generative art, offering a novel way to visualize and understand one's emotions through interactive and aesthetically pleasing means. — Role: designer

A_40.name: Logan Paul
A_40.idea: TaskPuncher (T03): TaskPuncher combines productivity with entertainment, offering a unique and memorable user experience that sets it apart from traditional to-do list apps. — Role: Presenter / Demo

A_41.name: Jake Paul
A_41.idea: EchoWave (T01): EchoWave leverages AI to identify and amplify underrepresented voices, ensuring marginalized communities have a stronger presence online. It uses advanced natural language processing to analyze content and promote posts that highlight diverse perspectives. — Role: presenter

A_42.name: Andrew Tate
A_42.idea: HabitHive (T03): HabitHive uniquely combines personal habit tracking with monetization opportunities, providing a seamless way for individuals to turn their daily activities into income streams. — Role: PM/Visionary, Presenter

A_43.name: Belle Delphine
A_43.idea: Nightmares & Advice (T03): The platform combines the psychological thrill of confronting one's fears with the practical utility of personalized advice, all while delivering a highly engaging and memorable user experience. — Role: presenter

A_44.name: Nikocado Avocado
A_44.idea: TearStream (T01): TearStream uniquely combines emotional expression with data analysis to provide a novel approach to mental health, leveraging the act of crying as a form of therapy. — Role: Presenter / Demo

A_45.name: Addison Rae
A_45.idea: MoodMatch (T01): MoodMatch leverages AI to foster emotional connection and empathy, addressing the social issue of loneliness and lack of genuine human interaction in today's digital age. — Role: Presenter/Marketer

A_46.name: MrBeast
A_46.idea: CommunityLink AI (T01): CommunityLink AI uniquely combines AI matchmaking with local volunteer opportunities, providing a personalized and effective way for individuals to engage in meaningful community service, thus creating tangible positive change. — Role: pm_visionary

A_47.name: Pokimane
A_47.idea: GamerHeal (T01): GamerHeal uniquely blends AI chatbot technology with the power of human connection to provide personalized mental health support specifically tailored to the gaming community, addressing a critical but often overlooked need. — Role: Community-Oriented PM, UX Advocate, and Storytelling Presenter

A_48.name: Kim Kardashian
A_48.idea: Objectify (T02): Objectify uniquely combines augmented reality with retail experiences, offering a novel way to interact with physical products and fostering community engagement through storytelling and virtual try-ons. — Role: Presenter / Demo

A_49.name: PewDiePie
A_49.idea: Meme Therapy (T01): Meme Therapy uniquely combines social impact with humor, addressing mental health through relatable and humorous content that resonates with a wide audience. — Role: presenter
